fixtureDescription: Blog post with HTML tags and code snippets mixed into prose
passage:
My Experience Learning to Code

When I first started learning to code, I felt completely overwhelmed. The syntax looked like a foreign language, and I struggled to understand even basic concepts like variables and functions.

const greeting = "Hello World";
console.log(greeting);

But gradually, things began to make sense. I learned that persistence is more important than talent. Every error message was an opportunity to improve.

Now I build websites and feel a genuine sense of accomplishment.
